visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a woman with long, straight blonde hair. She is smiling warmly and looking down and to her left. She wears a black top with a floral or patterned overlay and a necklace. In the background, a large, vintage-style poster with the word "Jouet" in large red letters is visible on the wall. The camera cuts to a wide shot of a group of people in a living room. The blonde woman is now kneeling on the floor, facing a group of five other people who are seated on two couches. The group includes four men and one woman, all looking towards the kneeling blonde woman. The room is filled with furniture, including a coffee table in the center and various lamps and decorative items in the background. A woman speaks in a slightly high-pitched, questioning, and concerned tone, asking, "Phoebe, what are you doing?" The camera returns to a medium shot of the blonde woman. She is now gesturing with both hands, palms up, as she speaks animatedly. Her expression is one of explanation or mild alarm. The background shows a wooden piece of furniture and a television screen.
